title: Grafana 12.3 — Redesigned Logs Panel
description: 12.3 shipped a redesigned logs panel with improved log-pattern recognition, inline controls, expandable columns, and faster scrolling for very chatty log streams. Toggle: `newLogsPanel`.

options.content:
### Redesigned logs panel (12.3)

- Pattern recognition groups repeating messages.
- Column controls (`Time / Severity / Message / Extracted`) are on the panel header, no more opening options.
- Tail mode stays smooth at 1000+ lines/s.

Change `$container` at the top to point the panel at any container Loki is scraping.
